creator: pluknet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sync Russian Porters Handbook with the latest English version.
Link integrity, style, etc are locally compile/look-tested.

Fix: 

The diff is huge, thus it's stored at remove cvs.

Diff can be generated from this link:
http://plukky.net/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml.diff?r1=text&tr1=1.1&r2=text&tr2=1.8

Or in complete form at http://plukky.net/~pluknet/patches/porters-handbook.diff
